caption:
✨ Ridgeway Plaza just hits different 🙌 Mississauga's hidden gem is out here proving that everything you need is closer than you think 📍

From the vibe to the variety — this plaza is doing the absolute most (in the best way) 💫

Tag someone who needs to check this spot out! 👇

📍 Ridgeway Plaza, Mississauga
🛍️ #ShopLocal #MississaugaEats
